title: Track Your Report
description: Enter your tracking ID to check the current status of your report.

compliance.title: Compliance Deadlines
compliance.acknowledged: Your report has been received and acknowledged.
compliance.feedbackProvided: Feedback has been provided on your report.
compliance.feedbackOverdue: The feedback deadline has passed. You may contact external authorities.

erasure.title: Erase My Data
erasure.warning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All data associated with this report — including evidence files, case notes, and the report itself — will be permanently deleted.
erasure.gdprNote: This is your right under GDPR Article 17 (Right to Erasure).
erasure.success: Your data has been permanently erased.
erasure.failed: Failed to erase data. Please try again.
